docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MACMURRAY PACIFIC AS TO DEFENDANT MOLINA, JUAN DBA DUCK CUSTOM CABINETRY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-23-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-23-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF MACMURRAY PACIFIC IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY ARON AHLAM, ASSISTANT CREDIT MANAGER. DEFENDANT JUAN MOLINA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-23-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MACMURRAY PACIFIC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOLINA, JUAN DBA DUCK CUSTOM CABINETRY $1,149.06 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,264.06 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $99.05 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT MOLINA, JUAN DBA DUCK CUSTOM CABINETRY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,149.06 FILED BY MACMURRAY PACIFIC AS TO DEFENDANT MOLINA, JUAN DBA DUCK CUSTOM CABINETRY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-23-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY (LORNA WALKER) FILED AS TO PLAINTIFF MACMURRAY PACIFIC
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF MACMURRAY PACIFIC AS TO DEFENDANT MOLINA, JUAN DBA DUCK CUSTOM CABINETRY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($85.00 SERVICE FEE) SERVED MAR-30-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MOLINA, JUAN DBA DUCK CUSTOM CABINETRY
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MACMURRAY PACIFIC
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED FOR THE WRIT ISSUED ON: 03/08/2018 AS TO DEFENDANT MOLINA, JUAN DBA DUCK CUSTOM CABINETRY
